text.title: Monolith Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (functional list, single deployable, test pyramid, single pipeline)?

text.example: Team 6 engineers, e-commerce MVP. Step 1 passes. Step 2 → vertical-slice (multiple feature teams). Step 3 ships GitHub Actions pipeline. Step 4 wraps order-creation in a single transaction (no saga). Step 5 budgets scale-up to 8 vCPU / 16 GB. Step 6 records 'extract checkout when independent scaling > 10× rest'. Spec ready.
